Mechanism Gaming Pillow for ROG Xbox Ally X/Ally

Buy for $67.50 (Reg. $75)

Clip the on-page coupon.

What we love

This Gaming Pillow is designed to make long gaming sessions on the couch or bed with the ROG Xbox Ally X and Ally more comfortable. The pillow features a soft, plush exterior and is machine washable for easy cleaning. It comes with the base Grip attachment, which you can use with other Mechanism accessories, too.

items.title: Tested: INKWON’s Tag is a fun 4-in-1 creative printing studio for images, stickers, temp tattoos, more and it fits in your palm
items.summary:
When it comes to pocket printers, there are plenty of options on the market in this day and age, though they tend to only stick to one focus and never try to offer multi-functional use. That gap is precisely where INKWON steps in, with its new Tag 4-in-1 Pocket Creative Studio handling just about everything – photos, stickers, heat-transfer clothing prints, and temporary tattoos. With this new first-gen device currently coming closer and closer to its Kickstarter end date, I got to go hands-on with a beta test of the system, and have walked away quite impressed that it keeps close to the company’s pitch.

You’re reading Tested with 9to5Toys, where we explore everyday tech essentials that make life a bit easier. Browse through our entire guide for all of the latest reviews, and sound off in the comments below if there’s something you’d like to see featured.

items.title: Lenovo’s Snapdragon X2 Elite OLED Yoga Slim 7x delivers solid value even at full price, and it’s down to $1,311 today (All-time low)
items.summary: As part of its wider Black Friday in June sale event, Lenovo is offering one of its latest Yoga Slim 7x OLED Copilot+ PCs down at $1,310.99 shipped. Don’t forget to enter promo code EXTRAFIVE during checkout. This is one of the newer notebooks to hit the shelves with Qualcomm’s Snapdragon X2 Elite processor, and it typically goes for $1,700. Today’s deal, however, delivers a $389 discount on its usual going rate to mark the steepest price drop we have tracked for it to date. This particular model hit the $1,350 mark just last week, but today’s offer lands it a touch lower to hit a new all-time low. We recently spent some time with this Yoga Slim 7x model for a hands-on review and found it to be a compelling option even at full price, so the discounted price makes it an even better value for your money.

This is the lowest price we have tracked for this unit, and it’s a great price for a DIY kit that you can customize and finish for way less than the fully assembled unit you get directly from the brand. items.title: Just $16 today gets you this compact 65W GaN charger with retractable USB-C cable (All-time low)
items.summary:
iOttie Basix 65W Retractable USB-C Wall Charger

Buy for $16 (Reg. $25)

Prime-exclusive discount.

What we love

This 65W iOttie GaN model is worth a look if you’re looking for a travel-friendly charger. Its compact design and foldable prongs make it easy to toss into a bag, while the built-in retractable USB-C cable eliminates the need to pack an extra cord for single-device charging. It can deliver up to 65W of power for laptops, tablets, and phones, and there’s also a secondary USB-C port available if you need to charge a second device.
